title: Simple Pocket Dimensions
description: Ads a new dimension that you can teleport to
body:
# Simple Pocket Dimensions
This mod ads a Pocket Dimension that can be used to build secret bases and escape enemys.

## Features List

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Pocket Dimension Key

- Pocket Dimension Keystone

- Keymaster Villager

- Keysmith

- Pocket Dimension



</details>

## Updates

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Plans: More Pocket Dimensions

</details>
